$comment: Template for logos.json. Copy this to logos.json and edit. Resolved by scripts/logo_resolver.py into assets/logo-.png. Priority per entry: upload (a file in uploads/) > favicon (auto-fetched from `domain`, or from `label` alone via Clearbit name->domain) > monogram (generated initials, never fails). Most entries need only `label` + `domain` — the resolver fetches the logo automatically, so uploads/ is just the fallback for private brands with no findable logo. The must match the resume.html marks.
